JournalMemo: Accrue April 2026 outbound freight expense (FreightClose calibrated estimate). Goods shipped in April; the carriers will invoice next month. The freight expense is recognized in the period the shipment occurred and carried as a matching accrued liability until the invoices arrive — a routine month-end accrued expense, not a loss contingency. Reverses on receipt of carrier invoices.
